## Changed
- Rebalanced tool and armor durability to reflect the steep diamond cost of the Lonsdaleite material chain.
  - **Tools/weapons** — Lonsdaleite durability `2640 → 2800`; Perfect Lonsdaleite `2640 → 3800`. Perfect Lonsdaleite tools are now a genuine durability upgrade over the base tier (previously identical).
  - **Armor** — Lonsdaleite durability multiplier `37 → 44`; Perfect Lonsdaleite `43 → 60` (e.g. Perfect Lonsdaleite chestplate `688 → 960`). Armor carries the steeper tier jump since it benefits far less from Unbreaking than tools do.

All other stats (mining speed, attack damage, enchantability, toughness, protection) are unchanged.
